message:
perf: defer cursor queries and add sentinel pre-check for frame hashing

Move cursor query after hash-skip check so idle panels avoid the
ghostty_surface_cursor_info() call entirely. When frames are unchanged
but input was pending, still query the cursor (handles invisible chars
like spaces that move the cursor without changing pixels).

Add 8-pixel sentinel sampling before full XxHash64 hash — catches ~95%
of unchanged frames in <100ns, saving the ~1-2ms full-buffer hash on
static content.
